release_notes: GC interval detection fix; stray one-off fix; stale date fix; PSA pay period metadata; Pay 1st ASAP option
changelog: FIX: GC interval detection tolerance tightened — monthly 30-31 day gaps no longer falsely detected as 4-weekly
FIX: GC stray one-off payment — rounding-adjusted first payments no longer split into standalone + truncated schedule
FIX: GC stale date check — exactly-4-day-ahead dates no longer falsely flagged
FIX: Existing PayPlan detection now only counts GoCardless DD payments (ignores credit card deposits)
NEW: PSA pay period metadata — recurring and pay_day written to sk_ps_meta table for audit trail
NEW: Pay 1st ASAP option in stale-date dialog — splits first payment as one-off, rest as normal schedule
NEW: _GetEarliestGCDate() helper — returns today + 4 days for display
IMPROVED: Meta values space-sanitised to survive shell argument splitting
